item.title: UM IT’S ONLY DAY 2 AND LOOK AT THIS BABY 😭 you can apply to adopt lido through the @Susquehanna SPCA or the link in my bio! he is located in upstate NY, but anyone in traveling distance is welcome to apply ❤️ ________________________ #catsoftiktok #cat #r
